title: Wholesome Chewy Mexican Chocolate Quesadilla
description: A kid-friendly mexican dish featuring marinated milk chocolate, chewy texture and umami flavor. Suitable for kosher families.
instructions: Place marinaded milk chocolate in a bowl and let it sit for at least 10 minutes to soften.
Combine corn salsa, sour cream, shredded cheese, salt, pepper, and softened milk chocolate in a mixing bowl.
Heat oil in a non-stick skillet over medium heat. Wet the surface of the quesadilla with a little bit of the chocolate mixture before adding tortillas.
Place 2-3 tablespoons of the chocolate mixture onto one side of each tortilla, fold and cook until golden brown on both sides (about 1 minute per side).
Serve hot with fresh chopped chives if desired.
